name: Detectron2 Dev Container
postCreateCommand: bash -c "sudo chown -R appuser:sudo /app && echo 'export PYTHONPATH=/opt/epic-kitchens/C1-Action-Recognition-TSN-TRN-TSM/src:$PYTHONPATH' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export PYTHONPATH=/opt/epic-kitchens/C1-Action-Recognition-TSN-TRN-TSM:$PYTHONPATH' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc"
